prompt: Which responsibility is shared among all internships?
expected: {"is_ambiguous": false, "sql": "SELECT Responsibilities.responsibility  from Internships_Responsibilities join Responsibilities on Internships_Responsibilities.responsibilityId = Responsibilities.id join Internships on Internships_Responsibilities.internshipId = Internships.id   GROUP BY Internships_Responsibilities.responsibilityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Internships_Responsibilities.internshipId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Internships)"}
